prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: mid-depth horizontal creek-water cutout reused in scenes 3, 4 and 5 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines the celadon water-paper shapes
Primary request: three layered horizontal bands of stylized flowing creek water with a few separated white paper ripples, occupying the lower-middle third and leaving the lowest subtitle strip mostly clear
Style/medium: handcrafted Chinese cut-paper water, visible fibers, matte celadon, muted teal and ivory, restrained ink
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: uniform key background; no reflections of people, text, watermark or logo; no #ff00ff in water; complete crisp cutout
Avoid: photoreal water, gradients in the key background, glossy 3D
